summary: package eu.kalafatic.utils.xml; import org.eclipse.jface.text.TextAttribute; import org.eclipse.jface.text.rules.IRule; import org.eclipse.jface.text.rules.IToken; import org.eclipse.jface.text.rules.RuleBasedScanner; import org.eclipse.jface.text.rules.SingleLineRule; import org.eclipse.jface.text.rules.Token; import org.eclipse.jface.text.rules.WhitespaceRule; import eu.kalafatic.utils.providers.ColorManager; public class XMLTagScanner extends RuleBasedScanner { public XMLTagScanner(ColorManager manager) { IToken string = new Token(new TextAttribute( manager.getColor(IXMLColorConstants.STRING))); IRule[] rules = new IRule[3]; rules[0] = new SingleLineRule("\
, string, '\'); rules[1] = new SingleLineRule("'", "'", string, '\'); rules[2] = new WhitespaceRule(new XMLWhitespaceDetector());
